ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for (petitioner) James Morman.

The Court that it needs a time frame for filing the first and final report and asked if there would be a waiver of accounting by Ms. Owens-Byrd filed . Ms. Gordon stated that she would be filing the waiver, that they filed a report on 9/24/15, that she had not been able to contact Mr. Morman for a long time and found out that he had been ill and hospitalized and that they are in communication at this time. The status of filing a final report was continued to December 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
